Before/after data sources.question: What feeds the BEFORE atlas view?
Before/after data sources.answer: Re-pack source PNGs at original dims
options_presented: Re-pack source PNGs at original dims

Before/after data sources.question: What dims drive each region in the BEFORE re-pack baseline?
For atlas-packed projects (Jokerman), what enters the BEFORE pack?
options_presented: Existing page dims (no re-pack for BEFORE)

Before/after data sources.question: What dims drive each region in the AFTER pack?
BEFORE/AFTER mode + resolution toggle clarification
Before/after data sources.answer: BEFORE/AFTER is a switch (Original / Optimized labels). Add a 2048 / 4096 resolution switch. Pager (< N / total >) for multi-page. Single page in main view. Per-page efficiency % shown. Total page count headline.

Visualization + packer params.question: How is each packed atlas page rendered visually?
Visualization + packer params.answer: 2D Canvas with packed region rectangles. Default: outline only (no colored fill, no labels). Hover: colored fill + label overlay. Region content = actual texture pixels drawn at packed coords (not solid colors).
options_presented: 2D canvas with colored region rectangles + name labels
HTML/CSS divs over a sized container

Visualization + packer params.question: Multi-page projection layout (from screenshot)
Visualization + packer params.answer: Pager pattern: < N / total > stepper in left rail. One page rendered at a time in main view. TOTAL ATLASES card shows headline count. EFFICIENCY (PAGE N) card shows per-page fill %.
options_presented: Vertical stack: one canvas per page, scroll
Grid: small page thumbnails laid out

Visualization + packer params.question: How does the renderer get region image pixels?
Visualization + packer params.answer: Claude's discretion → renderer loads source PNGs directly via file:// + canvas drawImage (atlas-packed: load page PNG once, drawImage srcRect crop per region).
options_presented: Renderer loads source PNGs directly via file:// +
Main process returns base64 data URLs per region
Main returns raw RGBA buffers via sharp.raw()

Visualization + packer params.question: Packer params exposed in UI?
Visualization + packer params.answer: Fixed: 2px padding, no rotation, smart heuristic. Footer disclaimer mirrors screenshot.
options_presented: Fixed: 2px padding, no rotation, smart heuristic
